thought.text: 编译通过，我将运行评分并查看剩余失败。

action.command:
cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task2-score; printf '
--- score ---
'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/score.txt | sed -n '1,140p'; printf '
--- failed score texts ---
'; for f in $(grep -l -v '\[PASS\]\|100.00/100.00' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/*/*/score.txt 2>/dev/null | head -30); do echo ===$f===; cat $f; done; printf '
--- log tail ---
'; tail -120 /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log 2>/dev/null

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task2-score; printf '\\n--- score ---\\n'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/score.txt | sed -n '1,140p'; printf '\\n--- failed score texts ---\\n'; for f in $(grep -l -v '\\[PASS\\]\\|100.00/100.00' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/*/*/score.txt 2>/dev/null | head -30); do echo ===$f===; cat $f; done; printf '\\n--- log tail ---\\n'; tail -120 /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log 2>/dev/null", "timeout": 240, "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Run task2 score after parser expansion"}

summary: Run task2 score after parser expansion
